{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/log/palm/line.png
|block_health=8
|tool=[[Axe]]
|rotation=log
}}

== Obtaining ==
Palm logs can be collected from palm trees, which spawn in warm beaches and oasis biomes. 

== Usage ==
Logs can be crafted into 4 planks or 2 branches.

== History ==

* [[0.1.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
[[Category:Logs]]
